dimensions.label: Noise and Environment
dimensions.description: General noise, quiet hours, focus and sleep sensitivity, lighting, and temperature preferences.

dimensions.label: Social Interaction
dimensions.description: Roommate relationship, shared activities, privacy, alone time, and comfort with visitors.

dimensions.label: Study, Work, and Daily Routine
dimensions.description: Study or work intensity, sleep schedule, focus needs, and weekday or weekend routines.

dimensions.label: Cultural Openness and Inclusion
dimensions.description: Comfort with different foods, languages, traditions, routines, and cultural misunderstandings.
dimensions.score_high: Highly open to different routines and backgrounds

dimensions.label: Household Structure and Shared Responsibilities
dimensions.description: Cleanliness, chores, shared supplies, food, guests, common areas, and household agreements.
dimensions.score_high: Highly structured and rule-oriented household agreements

dimensions.label: Flexibility, Communication, and Conflict
dimensions.description: Compromise, communication style, problem timing, repeated mistakes, and routine adaptation.
